001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
005import java.util.List;
006import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
007
008public interface EggGroupRepository {
009
010  LiveData<List<EggGroup>> getByBatch(long batchId);
011
012  LiveData<EggGroup> get(long id);
013
014  CompletableFuture<Long> save(EggGroup eggGroup);
015
016  CompletableFuture<List<Long>> saveAll(List<EggGroup> eggGroups);
017
018}
